mapper.select: SELECT PRS_ID as id, PRS_NAME as name, STORED_FILE_NM as image, STATUS_MSG as status FROM WH_PRESS WHERE PRS_USE_YN = 'Y' AND IS_STAR = 'Y' AND IS_POPULAR = 'Y' ORDER BY PRS_UPDATE_DATE DESC LIMIT 10
SELECT PRS_ID as id, PRS_NAME as name, STORED_FILE_NM as image, STATUS_MSG as status FROM WH_PRESS WHERE PRS_USE_YN = 'Y' AND IS_STAR = 'Y' ORDER BY PRS_NAME ASC
SELECT PRS_ID as id, PRS_NAME as name, STORED_FILE_NM as image, STATUS_MSG as status, PRS_HOMEPAGE as homepage FROM WH_PRESS WHERE PRS_ID = #{starId}

SELECT M.CON_ID, M.CON_BODY, M.IS_PINNED, M.CREATED_DATE,
-- [1] 미디어 정보 (비디오 링크 포함) D.THUMB_URL as image, D.MEDIA_URL, D.MEDIA_TYPE, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STAR_CONTENT_MEDIA WHERE CON_ID = M.CON_ID) as media_count,
-- [2] 작성자 정보 (WH_PRESS 조인 필요 없음, WH_STAR_CONTENT에 있다면 바로 사용) -- 만약 작성자 정보가 WH_PRESS 테이블에 있다면 아래처럼 조인해서 가져와야 합니다. -- (현재 쿼리상 M에 작성자 정보가 없어서 WH_PRESS(P)를 조인한다고 가정했습니다) P.PRS_NAME as MEM_NAME, P.STORED_FILE_NM as MEM_PICTURE,
-- [3] 좋아요 정보 (아까 추가하기로 한 부분) (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STAR_CONTENT_LIKE WHERE CON_ID = M.CON_ID) AS HEART_COUNT, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STAR_CONTENT_LIKE WHERE CON_ID = M.CON_ID AND MEM_ID = #{memId}) AS IS_LIKED
FROM WH_STAR_CONTENT M JOIN STAR_CONTENT_MEDIA D ON M.CON_ID = D.CON_ID LEFT JOIN WH_PRESS P ON M.PRS_ID = P.PRS_ID WHERE M.PRS_ID = #{starId} AND D.SORT_ORDER = 0 ORDER BY M.IS_PINNED DESC, M.CREATED_DATE DESC
SELECT A.CON_ID, A.CON_BODY, A.CREATED_DATE, A.IS_PINNED, A.PRS_ID, B.PRS_NAME, B.STORED_FILE_NM FROM WH_STAR_CONTENT A JOIN WH_PRESS B ON A.PRS_ID = B.PRS_ID WHERE A.CON_ID = #{conId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO WH_AD_LOG ( MEM_ID, PRS_ID, AD_TYPE, OS, ACTION, CREATED_DATE ) VALUES ( #{MEM_ID}, #{PRS_ID}, #{AD_TYPE}, #{OS}, #{ACTION}, NOW() )
